An agent could simply append comment strings like '// classNames?.icon styles?.icon clsx( message-icon export type PopconfirmSemanticType = { PopoverSemanticType["classNames"] PopconfirmSemanticAllType' to the files without implementing any actual functionality, and most text-based tests would pass.
